content: Keep this tab open until the payment is complete

comment.text: Instructional text within a callout on the payment completion page, warning users not to close the browser tab during a wallet top-up.

usage.context: className={styles.keepOpenCalloutIcon} aria-hidden="true" /> {isWalletOnly ? t("WalletTopUpKeepOpen") : t("AIPaywallCallbackKeepOpen")}
